uplink.description: telemetry: CO2 + air temperature + air humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (channel 1: measurementId 4097=23.5degC, 4098=45.2%RH, 4100=612ppm) with a valid CRC16 trailer computed against the SenseCAP table. Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (report_telemetry messages 23.5 / 45.2 / 612) and mapping by measurement ID.
Synthetic single-frame CO2 reading (measurementId 4100 = 800ppm) with a valid CRC16 trailer. Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (report_telemetry measurementValue 800).

Synthetic special dataID-7 frame (battery 100%, interval 60min) with a valid CRC16 trailer. Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (upload_battery 100, upload_interval 3600); battery percent is emitted as the batteryPercent extra because the vocabulary `battery` is volts.

uplink.description: corrupted payload: CRC trailer does not validate
uplink._note: The CO2-only frame above with its final CRC byte flipped (45 -> 46); the running CRC16 no longer reaches zero, matching upstream err -1.
